title: selaginella tenera
intro: Selaginella tenera, also known as the lesser spikenard, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family and is native to tropical regions of the world. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, as well as antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Selaginella tenera include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory and cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Selaginella tenera can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
